property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.12/bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21/bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21/bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.12;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\WINDOWS\system32\config\systemprofile\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;.

testcase.name: runScenario["To validate the search functionality", "To validate the flipkart application"](1)
testcase.system-out:
Browser set to: chrome
@tc001 @Regression @ParallelSafe Scenario: To validate the search functionality # src/test/resources/features/searchfunctionality.feature:9 Launching browser: chrome ✔ Given Launch the Flipkart application # stepdefination.searchmobile_testcase.launch_the_flipkart_application() Online Shopping India Mobile, Cameras, Lifestyle & more Online @ Flipkart.com ✔ When close the popup # stepdefination.searchmobile_testcase.close_the_popup() true ✔ Then It should navigate to home page # stepdefination.searchmobile_testcase.it_should_navigate_to_home_page() ✔ Given user enter the text in the search field # stepdefination.searchmobile_testcase.user_enter_the_text_in_the_search_field() ✔ When clicks the search button # stepdefination.searchmobile_testcase.clicks_the_search_button() true Mobiles- Buy Products Online at Best Price in India - All Categories | Flipkart.com ✔ Then It should navigate to the search result page and display the relevent details # stepdefination.searchmobile_testcase.it_should_navigate_to_the_search_result_page_and_display_the_relevent_details() before Filter :realme P4 Power 5G (TransSilver, 128 GB) 4.53,746 Ratings & 338 Reviews 8 GB RAM | 128 GB ROM 17.27 cm (6.8 inch) Full HD+ AMOLED Display 50MP + 8MP | Yes 10001 mAh Battery Dimensity 7400 Ultra Processor 1 Year Manufacturer Warranty for Device and 6 Months Manufacturer Warranty for Inbox Accessories ✔ And Select Minimun and Maximun Amount # stepdefination.Filter_stepdef.select_minimun_and_maximun_amount() ✔ And Select the Brand # stepdefination.Filter_stepdef.select_the_brand() ✔ And Select the Ram # stepdefination.Filter_stepdef.select_the_ram() ✔ And Select Battery Capacity # stepdefination.Filter_stepdef.select_battery_capacity() ***************************** afterfilter :vivo V9 Youth (Black, 32 GB) 4.426,213 Ratings & 2,791 Reviews 4 GB RAM | 32 GB ROM | Expandable Upto 256 GB 16.0 cm (6.3 inch) Full HD+ Display 16MP + 2MP | 16MP Front Camera 3260 mAh Li-ion Battery Qualcomm Snapdragon 450 Processor Brand Warranty of 1 Year Available for Mobile and 6 Months for Accessories ✔ Then It should display the Relevant result # stepdefination.Filter_stepdef.it_should_display_the_relevant_result()
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. May 07, 2026 9:38:44 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find an exact match for CDP version 147, returning the closest version; found: 143; Please update to a Selenium version that supports CDP version 147

testcase.name: runScenario["To validate search functionality with different values", "To validate the flipkart application"](2)
testcase.system-out: @tc003 @Regression @ParallelSafe Scenario: To validate search functionality with different values # src/test/resources/features/searchfunctionality.feature:38 Launching browser: chrome ✔ Given Launch the Flipkart application # stepdefination.searchmobile_testcase.launch_the_flipkart_application() Online Shopping India Mobile, Cameras, Lifestyle & more Online @ Flipkart.com ✔ When close the popup # stepdefination.searchmobile_testcase.close_the_popup() true ✔ Then It should navigate to home page # stepdefination.searchmobile_testcase.it_should_navigate_to_home_page() ✔ Given Enter the "Mobile" in the field # stepdefination.MultipleSearch_stepdef.enter_the_in_the_field(java.lang.String) ✔ When click the search button # stepdefination.MultipleSearch_stepdef.click_the_search_button() Mobile- Buy Products Online at Best Price in India - All Categories | Flipkart.com ******************************************** ✔ Then it should navigates to the text page and display the corresponding page # stepdefination.MultipleSearch_stepdef.it_should_navigates_to_the_text_page_and_display_the_corresponding_page()

testcase.name: runScenario["To get the title and price from search", "To validate the flipkart application"](6)
testcase.system-out: @tc005 @Regression @ParallelSafe Scenario: To get the title and price from search # src/test/resources/features/searchfunctionality.feature:55 Launching browser: chrome ✔ Given Launch the Flipkart application # stepdefination.searchmobile_testcase.launch_the_flipkart_application() Online Shopping India Mobile, Cameras, Lifestyle & more Online @ Flipkart.com ✔ When close the popup # stepdefination.searchmobile_testcase.close_the_popup() true ✔ Then It should navigate to home page # stepdefination.searchmobile_testcase.it_should_navigate_to_home_page() ✔ Given Enter the search text in the text field # stepdefination.Titleprice_stepdef.enter_the_search_text_in_the_text_field() No such Element exception ✔ When click the search icon # stepdefination.Titleprice_stepdef.click_the_search_icon() 0 ✔ Then It should display the search result and get the title # stepdefination.Titleprice_stepdef.it_should_display_the_search_result_and_get_the_title()

testcase.name: runScenario["To Test the search functionality with excell sheet", "To validate the flipkart application"](7)

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element located by By.xpath: (//input[@name='q'])[1] (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.39.0', revision: '126f156aee' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.9' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.138, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: C:\WINDOWS\SystemTemp\scope...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:62527}, goog:processID: 18124, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:62527/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.138, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: fb654672098aedab7f2d1e0290096993
